name: Tempeh Stuffed Cremini Mushrooms

ingredients.item: tempeh, diced very small, or pulsed small

method: Remove stems from the mushrooms and set the caps aside. Finely chop the stems and set aside.

Heat 3 tablespoons of water in a medium skillet. Add the chopped mushroom stems and onion. Sauté 10 to 15 minutes or until onion is translucent. Add the tempeh and cook another 5 minutes. Add onion powder, cayenne pepper, rice, and tamari. Cook 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Stuff mushroom caps and place on baking sheet. Bake for 20 minutes.
